description: System, Gateways, Interfaces, PF Firewall state tables, WireGuard VPN — powered by node_exporter

panels.description: Time since last boot
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: ARC hit rate; low values mean ZFS is reading from disk more often
panels.title: ZFS ARC Hit Rate

panels.description: 1=online, 0=down
panels.title: Gateway Status

panels.description: Packet loss % for all gateways on selected instance
panels.title: Gateway Packet Loss

panels.description: Round-trip delay (ms) for all gateways
panels.title: Gateway RTT

panels.description: RTT standard deviation (ms) — higher = more unstable
panels.title: Gateway Jitter

panels.description: 1 = handshake within last 3 minutes
panels.title: WireGuard Peer Up

panels.description: Delay = RTT, stddev = jitter. High jitter indicates unstable connection.
panels.title: Gateway RTT & Jitter

panels.description: 1=up, 0=down
panels.title: Interface Status

panels.description: Bytes/sec received per interface (node_network)
panels.title: Interface Throughput — RX

panels.description: Bytes/sec transmitted per interface (node_network)
panels.title: Interface Throughput — TX

panels.description: Packets/sec received per interface (node_network)
panels.title: Interface Packet Rate — RX

panels.description: Packets/sec transmitted per interface (node_network)
panels.title: Interface Packet Rate — TX

panels.description: Any sustained non-zero values indicate a problem (node_network)
panels.title: Interface Errors & Drops

panels.description: Rate of bytes matching block rules — spikes may indicate attacks or misconfiguration

panels.description: Packets/s matching block rules
panels.title: PF Blocked Packets Rate

panels.description: 1=up, 0=down
panels.title: WireGuard Interface State

panels.description: 1=handshake within 3 minutes, 0=stale/down
panels.title: WireGuard Peer Status

panels.description: 0 = never handshaked. >180s means peer is likely down.
panels.title: Seconds Since Last Handshake

panels.description: % of queries answered from cache
panels.title: Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: Query arrival rate
panels.title: Total Queries / s

panels.description: Failed recursive lookups — high = upstream or DNSSEC issues
panels.title: SERVFAIL / s

panels.description: Mean time to resolve a recursive query
panels.title: Avg Recursion Time

panels.description: Rate of total queries, cache hits, and cache misses
panels.title: Query Volume

panels.description: Rate of answers by RCODE — SERVFAIL spikes indicate upstream or DNSSEC problems
panels.title: DNS Response Codes

panels.description: Rate of DNS query types — useful for understanding traffic profile
panels.title: Query Types

panels.description: Average and median time to fully resolve a recursive query
panels.title: Recursion Latency

panels.description: Number of entries in each Unbound cache
panels.title: Cache Sizes

panels.description: Secure answers, bogus answers (failed DNSSEC), and unwanted queries/replies
panels.title: DNSSEC & Unwanted Traffic

panels.description: Seconds since Unbound resolver started
panels.title: Unbound Uptime
